---
title: "another experiment"
author: "Evangeline Reynolds"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(tidyverse.quiet = TRUE)
```




## Intro Thoughts


RoSE Recruitment Application Form June 2026


Thank you for your interest in joining the RoSE (Researchers of Statistics Education) Network Committee.


The RoSE Network aims to create an open and inclusive space for multidisciplinary researchers and practitioners of statistics education globally to connect, learn, and collaborate.


We welcome applications from individuals at any career stage, from any background, and from anywhere in the world.


This application form includes both general and role-specific questions. Please answer all relevant sections carefully.


Deadline: Friday 26th June 2026 (midnight, your local time).


Voting will take place until 17th July by RoSE core and general committee members. Anyone on the committee who has nominated themselves will abstain from voting in that round. In the event of a draw, an additional round of committee voting will be held between the tied candidates.


If only one candidate applies for a role and their application aligns with RoSE’s vision and the role outline, voting will still commence; however, this will be to confirm the applicant’s suitability for the role.


If no nominations are received for a role, applications will be extended by one week. If there are still no nominations after this extension period, the role will remain vacant and will be open for application in the next recruitment round.


Planned outcome emails will be sent in the week commencing 20th July once votes have been counted. If an additional round of voting is required due to a draw, candidates will be notified of the delay in the decision.

If you have any questions or issues with the form please email Abi Jones: arrj1@leicester.ac.uk

evangeline.mae@gmail.com Switch account
 
Not shared
 
Draft saved
* Indicates required question
Applicant Information
Full Name
*
Preferred Pronouns (e.g., she/her, he/him / they/them)
Preferred Email Address 
*
Current Institution / Affiliation(s)
Role Selection
Which role are you applying for? 

If you are applying for multiple roles, please complete separate applications for each role if they are very different, e.g., director and website officer. The number of positions available is indicated by x1 or x2.

Director (x1)
Co-Director – Communications (x1)
Co-Director – Conference Chair (Majority World e.g., Asia, Africa, and Latin America) (x1)
Co-Director – Research Methods & Practice (x2)
Co-Director – Finance (x2)
Geographic Centre Lead Oceania (please specify region below)
Communications Team Member: Website Officer (x2)
SIG Lead – Statistics Pedagogy (x1)
If applicable: What region would you represent? (Geographic Centre Leads only type N/A otherwise)
Motivation
Why do you want to join the RoSE Committee?
 (150 words max)

Why are you applying for this specific role?
 (150 words max)
Skills, Experience & Background
What do you think you could bring to this role?
 (200 words max)
Please summarise your statistics education experience, research interests, or relevant background. Note: prior research experience is not required.
 (200 words max) 
How much time can you realistically dedicate to RoSE per month on average (we are aware of academic cycles and busy periods, so please approximate)?
Less than 2 hours
2–5 hours
5–10 hours
10+ hours
How will you ensure you can maintain this level of commitment?
 (150 words max)
Role-Specific Questions
Please answer the following question for the role/(s) that you are applying for. Please leave the questions for roles you are not applying for blank or add NA.
Director 
Director (x1)
1)How would you approach strategic leadership within a global volunteer network?

2)Describe your leadership style and how you manage competing priorities

Please answer in the format of 1) and 2).

Communications Roles
Co-Director – Communications (x1)
Communications Team Member: Website Officer (x2)
1)Describe your experience with communications (social media, newsletters, websites)

2)How would you increase global engagement with RoSE?

Please answer in the format of 1) and 2).
Research Methods & Practice Co-Director
Co-Director – Research Methods & Practice (x2)
1)What types of research support initiatives would you develop?

2)What gaps do you see in current research training/support?

Please answer in the format of 1) and 2).

Conference Chair
Co-Director – Conference Chair (Majority World e.g., Asia, Africa, and Latin America) (x1)
1)Describe experience organising events (virtual or in-person)

2)How would you ensure accessibility and inclusivity in conferences?

Please answer in the format of 1) and 2).
SIG Lead
SIG Lead – Statistics Pedagogy (x1)
1)How would you run and sustain engagement in a SIG?

2)What topics or themes would your SIG prioritise?


Please answer in the format of 1) and 2).
Finance 
Co-Director – Finance (x2)
1)Describe any experience with budgeting, funding, or grant applications

2)How would you approach sustainable funding for RoSE?

Please answer in the format of 1) and 2).
Geographic Centre Lead 
Geographic Centre Lead Oceania (x1)

1)What initiatives, ideas, or developments would you bring to this role? (e.g., projects, improvements, events, strategies).

Accessibility & Inclusion
Do you have any accessibility requirements for meetings or online collaboration?
Additional Information
Is there anything else you would like to tell us?
 (Optional)

RoSE is a volunteer-led network that relies on active participation from its committee members.
Before applying, please consider whether you feel able to commit to the expectations of a committee role, including:

1)Engaging actively with your role and responsibilities 
2)Communicating proactively if you are unable to fulfil your duties 
3)Responding to communications in a timely manner 
4)Upholding the RoSE values and Code of Conduct
If your application is successful, you will receive a committee induction booklet and a formal agreement to confirm your commitment to these expectations.

Do you feel able to commit to these expectations?

*
Yes
No
Other:
Never submit passwords through Google Forms.
This content is neither created nor endorsed by Google. - Contact form owner - Terms of Service - Privacy Policy
Does this form look suspicious? Report

Google Forms
